pluginMechanism: context routing and sandboxed tool output

args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
- Reads as: TypeScript class with generic Env type, handler typing utilities
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper for programmatically creating Hono apps and middleware with typed handler arrays (1-10 handlers).

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Route inspection utilities using request match data and WeakMap caching
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
- Safe summary: Route context helpers to inspect matched routes and compute path bases with parameter substitution.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSContext, WSEvents, defineWebSocketHelper, UpgradeWebSocket, WSMessageReceive
- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade helper with event listener typing and context for sending/closing messages
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade middleware allowing dynamic event handlers via createEvents function pattern.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, generateCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Cookie read/write helpers supporting standard, __Secure-, and __Host- prefixes
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading/writing signed and unsigned cookies with secure host prefix support.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Test client generator using hc client with custom fetch wrapping app.request
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types
- Safe summary: Testing helper that creates a client configured to call local Hono app instances.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: Runtime detection helper identifying node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Adapter helper that detects runtime environment and provides typed access to platform globals.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS template tag helper with class name generation and style injection
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
- Safe summary: Experimental CSS helper using template literals for class-based styling with server/client rendering support.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, minify, toHash, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
- Reads as: Shared CSS utility functions and types for class name generation and style string building
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: Common utilities for CSS helper including hash generation, class name slug validation, and minification.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Fetch wrapper for proxying requests with hop-by-hop header stripping and strict RFC compliance mode
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper that wraps fetch with automatic handling of hop-by-hop headers and optional RFC 9110 strict mode.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Development helper for inspecting and displaying registered routes with optional colorization
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Dev helper to display route lists with method/path/handler names, optionally colorized.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: HTML string interpolation helper escaping values and supporting async callbacks
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML escaping helper using template strings with support for escaped objects and async content.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: SSG generation exports combining ssg.ts, middleware.ts, and plugins
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: Static site generation helper exposing core functions, middleware, and default plugins.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks
- Reads as: Main SSG implementation with concurrent fetching, file saving, and plugin hooks
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/client/utils, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime
- Safe summary: Core SSG logic fetching route content via pool concurrency and saving to filesystem with plugin extensibility.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path utilities for SSG including path joining, dynamic route filtering, and traversal protection
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path manipulation, dynamic route detection, and output directory safety.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, isSSGContext, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSGParams
- Reads as: SSG middleware for detecting SSG context and enabling/disabling static generation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: Middleware helpers for SSG context detection and conditional route handling based on static generation status.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, StreamingApi
- Reads as: Streaming exports delegating to stream.ts, sse.ts, and text.ts implementations
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Streaming helper exporting stream utilities for generic, SSE, and text-based streaming responses.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: Generic streaming response factory using TransformStream with error handling and context stash
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Base streaming helper creating chunked responses with TransformStream and Bun abort handling.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: Server-Sent Events streaming with event/id/retry fields and formatted data lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/utils/html, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: SSE streaming helper formatting messages as Event Stream Protocol with chunked transfer and error event support.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Text streaming wrapper setting Content-Type to text/plain with nosniff header
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: Text-specific streaming helper that configures headers for plain text chunked responses.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Accept header parser delegating to accepts.ts implementation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header helper exported from index.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch, parseAccept
- Reads as: Accept header matcher comparing client preferences against supported types with quality sorting
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/utils/accept
- Safe summary: Accept header matching helper that returns best supported type from sorted quality-based accepts list.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
- Reads as: ConnInfo type re-exports only
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: Type-only exports delegating to types.ts definitions.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: Connection info types with remote address/port and IPv4/IPv6 type support
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: TypeScript definitions for HTTP connection information including remote address type and port.
